info.name: PiPiMink
info.description: Collection for testing the PiPiMink API. Routing is always based on the last user message; the full conversation history is forwarded to the chosen model.

request.description: Single-turn request. PiPiMink picks the best model based on the prompt.
Technical question about implementing a data structure.
Creative writing task to test language capabilities.
Mathematical problem solving to test analytical capabilities.
Multi-turn request using the native /chat endpoint. Routing is decided on the last user message; the full history is sent to the chosen model.
Multi-turn request via the OpenAI-compatible endpoint. The model field is respected if the model exists in the registry; otherwise PiPiMink routes automatically.
Conversation history including a system prompt. The full history including the system message is forwarded to the chosen model.
Returns all models in the registry with their enabled status and capability tags.
Triggers a full model refresh: queries all providers, collects self-reported capability tags, and updates PostgreSQL. Requires X-API-Key header matching ADMIN_API_KEY.
